heading: Enable the Atlas-Managed Slow Operation Threshold
body:
To enable the Atlas-managed slow operation threshold for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas performanceAdvisor slowOperationThreshold enable [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas performanceAdvisor slowOperationThreshold enable](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-performanceAdvisor-slowOperationThreshold-enable).
